title: Exercises: Controlled Gates
description: Practice with controlled-U and Toffoli gates

exercises.title: Implement Controlled-U
exercises.description: Implement a function that creates controlled-U for any 2×2 unitary U.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def controlled_U(U):
    '''Create 4x4 controlled-U matrix.'''
    pass

# Test with various gates
X = np.array([[0,1],[1,0]])
Z = np.array([[1,0],[0,-1]])
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)

for name, gate in [('X', X), ('Z', Z), ('H', H)]:
    CU = controlled_U(gate)
    print(f'C{name} is unitary: {np.allclose(CU @ CU.conj().T, np.eye(4))}')
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def controlled_U(U):
    '''Create 4x4 controlled-U matrix.'''
    proj_0 = np.array([[1,0],[0,0]])
    proj_1 = np.array([[0,0],[0,1]])
    I = np.eye(2)
    return np.kron(proj_0, I) + np.kron(proj_1, U)

X = np.array([[0,1],[1,0]])
Z = np.array([[1,0],[0,-1]])
H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)

for name, gate in [('X', X), ('Z', Z), ('H', H)]:
    CU = controlled_U(gate)
    print(f'C{name} is unitary: {np.allclose(CU @ CU.conj().T, np.eye(4))}')

exercises.title: Toffoli Gate
exercises.description: Implement the Toffoli gate and verify its action on |110⟩ and |111⟩.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def toffoli():
    '''Create 8x8 Toffoli gate.'''
    pass

# Test
T = toffoli()
ket_110 = np.zeros(8); ket_110[6] = 1
ket_111 = np.zeros(8); ket_111[7] = 1

print('Toffoli|110⟩ =', T @ ket_110)
print('Toffoli|111⟩ =', T @ ket_111)
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def toffoli():
    '''Create 8x8 Toffoli gate.'''
    T = np.eye(8)
    # Swap positions 6 and 7 (|110⟩ ↔ |111⟩)
    T[6,6] = 0; T[7,7] = 0
    T[6,7] = 1; T[7,6] = 1
    return T

T = toffoli()
ket_110 = np.zeros(8); ket_110[6] = 1
ket_111 = np.zeros(8); ket_111[7] = 1

print('Toffoli|110⟩ =', T @ ket_110, '= |111⟩')
print('Toffoli|111⟩ =', T @ ket_111, '= |110⟩')
hints: Only swap positions 6 and 7 in identity
